name: Proya Cosmetics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Proya Cosmetics Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells skin care products in China and rest of Asia. It offers its products under the PROYA, UZERO, ANYA, YOYA, and CATS & ROSES brands. The company markets its products through a distribution network covering department stores, cosmetic boutiques, supermarket chains, and electronic business platforms in approximately 30 cities in China. Proya Cosmetics Co.,Ltd. is based in Hangzhou, China.
